intended_use: The Zebra HealthJOINT device is a software tool for 3D reconstruction of bones from a set of 2D radiographs. The device is intended for assisting clinicians in the preoperative planning of knee orthop
intended_use_full: The Zebra HealthJOINT device is a software tool for 3D reconstruction of bones from a set of 2D radiographs. The device is intended for assisting clinicians in the preoperative planning of knee orthopedic surgical procedures.
target_condition: Knee orthopedic surgical planning; osteoarthritis (Kellgren-Lawrence grades 1-4) and healthy bones
ground_truth: CT scan of the same patient (within 6 months of X-ray) and assessment by an experienced US Board-Certified radiologist
other_metrics: Femur RMSE: 1.14 (95% CI: [1.097, 1.187]); Tibia RMSE: 1.05 (95% CI: [1.005, 1.087]); Fibula RMSE: 0.94 (95% CI: [0.891, 0.986]); anatomic landmark positioning precision met performance goal (standard deviation of distance in mm reported but specific value not stated)
